title: main.c standalone mode RX callback logs but doesn't process packets
description:
main.c:47-58: lora_rx_handler() in standalone mode logs 'RX: %zu bytes' but the comment says 'Future: Parse LICHEN frame, verify signature, check replay, decompress SCHC, inject into IPv6 stack.'

What goes wrong: In standalone mode (CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2 without CONFIG_LICHEN_L2), received packets are silently discarded after logging. A user testing this mode will see RX log messages and assume the stack is working, but no actual packet processing occurs.

The mode is explicitly for 'testing/debugging without the full IPv6 stack' per the comment at line 33-41, but the behavior difference is subtle.

Fix: Make the log message clearer: 'RX: %zu bytes (STANDALONE MODE - packet discarded)' or similar.
close_reason: Fixed: Updated lora_rx_handler() log to 'RX: N bytes (standalone mode - not processed)' making it explicit that packets are logged but discarded in standalone mode
